name: The Freak Circus
description:
The Freak Circus — open-scenario

(Doesn't include Columbia)

Fandom: The Freak Circus

Characters in bot: Pierrot, Harlequin, Jester, The Doctor, Ticket Taker

Relationship with user: It is already stated that user helped Pierrot when he was in need, and that he's heavily in love with them. It is also stated that Harlequin has an interest in user too.

⭐️IMPORTANT: I'm sorry, but Columbia is absent in this bot. I honestly didn't want the bot to be too bloated by tokens — but I might add her in the future.

The starting message is just a start-up for user to continue! But I also added a second scenario, where you can do whatever you want!

❏ I guess it is SFW? I'm not too sure, honestly. But the starting message is definitely SFW!

❏ ANY!POV, {{user}}'s gender not mentioned at all

❏ My Proxy is always on

❏ I'm not an English Speaker, so be prepared for possible grammatical errors!

❏ WARNINGS: yandere tendencies, stalking, creepy behavior, murder clowns, notions to cannibalism?

ART CREDIT: No idea, I found it on Pinterest and would love to credit the incredible artist of this piece!

Request? : ❌

REQUEST FORM: I don't have one, and I don't think I will. But if you have an idea for a bot, and want to present it to me (I'm honored) you can do so under the comments of my bots.

Just please be mindful, because I'm not obligated to respond to your request positively. Please don't be pushy, and entitled. I can always deny your request if I'm not in the mood, or I just don't want to do it, for various reasons.

I tried to stick as close to the original personalities as possible! But there might be small mistakes, since I wrote all of the text by myself! Still, I hope you'll enjoy! ^^
creator: MALINA.
